# Copilot instructions

## Mandatory pre-work checklist

- Before analysis, planning, or edits, read `/tmp/workspace/Guebbit/boilerplate-node-backend/AI_README.md`.
- Treat `/tmp/workspace/Guebbit/boilerplate-node-backend/AI_README.md` as required repository policy and follow it during the whole task.
- Use this file as the short enforcement layer. Use `/tmp/workspace/Guebbit/boilerplate-node-backend/AI_README.md` as the detailed handbook.
- For every change, check whether documentation must be updated.
- If behavior, API, setup, architecture, scripts, workflows, or developer instructions change, update the relevant documentation in the same task.
- Do not finish a task with code and documentation out of sync.
